Moon Traveler Terminal Ice Crystal A pure crystalline structure harvested from the ice. Used for ship hull repairs and can be processed into water at the Kitchen Bay. Needed for ship repair!
Game Configuration Save directory: /Users/elephantatech/.moonwalker/saves GPU mode: cpu Context size: 8192 Sound effects: ON Config file: /Users/elephantatech/.moonwalker/config.json
config savedir /path/to/saves — change save location config gpu auto|gpu|cpu — change compute mode config context 8192 — change LLM context window sound — toggle sound effects▇▇ ARIA:Repair progress: 0/3. Materials and crew assistance are still needed. ▏ Food█████100%Water█████100%Suit█████100%Batt██████115%Ship Crash Site > Enter command...
=======
Moon Traveler Terminal screenshot — Save a screenshot (F12) tutorial — Replay the tutorial config — Game settings (save path, GPU, context) clear / cls — Clear the screen help — Show this help message quit / exit — Exit game
Ship Bays (Crash Site): ship repair — Install repair materials to fix the ship ship storage — Stash/retrieve items from ship storage ship kitchen — Cook bio_gel (+40% food) or ice_crystal (+40% water) ship charging — Recharge drone battery, overcharge, auto-charge toggle ship medical — Repair suit (costs battery) or rest to recover
Ice Crystal A pure crystalline structure harvested from the ice. Used for ship hull repairs and can be processed into water at the Kitchen Bay. Needed for ship repair!
